subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon We departed from the House, proceeding toward another place until We reached it and made it Our seat of observation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه خرجنا من البیت مقبلا الی مقام آخر الی ان بلغنا و جعلناه المنظر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized)
